hero.headline: Four Decades of Grounds Done Right
hero.subheadline: Since 1983, Louisiana Landscape Specialty has kept Southeast Louisiana's commercial properties pristine. With 100+ professionals across three locations, we handle everything from irrigation to pest control so you can focus on running your business.

services.label: Our Capabilities
services.headline: Commercial Landscape Solutions<br class="hidden md:block"> That Protect Your Investment
services.subtitle: From weekly grounds maintenance to full-scale landscape installations, our licensed professionals deliver consistent, high-quality results that keep your property looking its best year-round.

cards.title: Landscape Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive commercial lawn care including mowing, edging, weed control, tree pruning, and year-round groundskeeping that keeps your property looking pristine every season.

cards.title: Irrigation Services
cards.description: Licensed and certified irrigation installation, maintenance, repair, and diagnostics to ensure your landscape stays healthy and water-efficient through Louisiana's demanding climate.

cards.title: Landscape Enhancements
cards.description: Seasonal color plans, flower bed designs, mulch and pine straw installation, and decorative trimming to elevate your property's curb appeal and create inviting outdoor spaces.

cards.title: Landscape Installation
cards.description: Professional design and build of complete commercial landscapes including plantings, hardscapes, and outdoor features tailored to your property's unique needs.

cards.title: Outdoor Lighting
cards.description: Expert outdoor lighting design and installation to enhance safety, security, and visual appeal of your commercial property during evening and nighttime hours.

cards.title: Pest Control & Facility Services
cards.description: Licensed pest control to protect your landscape investment plus comprehensive facility maintenance for corporate offices, retail centers, and healthcare campuses.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Flawless Property

steps.title: Schedule a Property Walk-Through
steps.description: Tell us about your property and goals. Our team will conduct a complimentary site assessment and deliver a detailed, transparent proposal within 48 hours.

steps.title: We Deploy Your Dedicated Crew
steps.description: A licensed, experienced team is assigned to your property. From mowing to irrigation to pest control, every detail is managed so nothing falls through the cracks.

steps.title: Enjoy a Property That Impresses
steps.description: Your grounds stay immaculate year-round. With 43 years of expertise and 100+ professionals behind every visit, your property makes the right impression every day.

about.label: Why Property Managers Trust Us
about.headline: 43 Years of Southeast Louisiana Expertise You Can Count On
about.description: Founded in 1983 by Randy M. Loup, Louisiana Landscape Specialty grew from a small operation into one of the largest landscape contracting companies in the Gulf region. Now backed by Landscape Workshop, we combine four decades of local knowledge with the resources of a national leader. Our crew's combined tenure of 28+ years means the same skilled professionals show up to your property every time.

features.title: 100+ Licensed Professionals
features.description: Every team member is trained and certified. From irrigation specialists to pest control operators, you get licensed expertise on every visit.

features.title: Three Regional Locations
features.description: With offices across Southeast Louisiana, we respond quickly to service calls and maintain consistent coverage for all our commercial clients.

features.title: Backed by Landscape Workshop
features.description: Acquired in 2023 by one of the nation's largest commercial landscapers, we combine local roots with national resources and best practices.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Professional Results.
pricing.subtitle: Every property is unique. Contact us for a custom proposal tailored to your grounds, your budget, and your expectations.

guarantee.headline: Our "Superior Service" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of our work doesn't meet your standards, contact us within 24 hours and our crew will return to make it right at no additional cost. With 43 years of reputation on the line, we stand behind every visit, every crew, and every detail.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing our property?
faqs.answer: Most new commercial clients are onboarded within one to two weeks. We begin with a thorough property assessment, then assign a dedicated crew and create a custom maintenance schedule tailored to your property's needs.

faqs.question: Do you handle both small and large commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve everything from single-building corporate offices to sprawling retail centers, healthcare campuses, educational institutions, and hospitality properties across Southeast Louisiana.

faqs.question: Are your team members licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold Louisiana landscape contractor, general contractor, irrigation, and pest control licenses. Every team member is fully insured, and our certifications are current and verifiable.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Gretna, New Orleans, Metairie, Kenner, Harvey, Marrero, Covington, Mandeville, Slidell, and the greater Southeast Louisiana region from our three office locations.

faqs.question: What changed after the Landscape Workshop acquisition?
faqs.answer: Our founder Randy Loup remains as Partner, and our experienced crews stayed intact. The acquisition added national resources and best practices while preserving the local relationships and service quality our clients expect.

testimonials.name: Randy M. Loup
testimonials.text: Our organization has built a solid reputation over the years, establishing trust with our clients through a highly skilled team that consistently delivers exceptional commercial landscape services.

testimonials.name: J.T. Price
testimonials.text: We are thrilled to welcome the LLS team members to our family. Their expertise in the Gulf region strengthens our ability to deliver outstanding landscape services across the Southeast.

testimonials.name: Commercial Property Mgr.
testimonials.text: You can trust that Louisiana Landscape will provide superior service, every time. Their crew's combined tenure of over 28 years shows in the quality and consistency of their work.

Make an Impression?
contact.subtitle: Request a complimentary property assessment. Our team will walk your site, identify opportunities, and deliver a detailed proposal with transparent pricing.
benefits: Free property assessment with every proposal
